{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Alliance encampment
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fisher section]] is located within the [[Alliance encampment]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
